About Me

My Introduction

Hey, I’m AbdulRehman — a Software Engineer building full stack apps with React/Next.js, Node.js, MongoDB, and Tailwind CSS and also use bootsrap, python and django. I use Docker and GitHub Actions for smooth deployment.

I care about clean design, great UX, and building products that solve real problems and scale well.

Download Resume
); }; export default About;
